title: Quests Journey
description: Embark on quests like never before!
body:
![Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c17fa2b6485b92cb9ef944879375d7b57455536a.png)
# Introducing the Quests Journey Pack!

*Get ready to embark on epic adventures with this Quest system for Minecraft!*

# How it works  
You can earn quests by **defeating mobs**. The stronger the mob, the higher the chance to receive a quest. Complete quests to earn **XP and points**, which can be used to **buy items, keys, and more** using:

`/trigger quests_gui`

![main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9231c848f3b3871ca099f5a0f238448a132b6c71.png)

## Quest Rarities  
There are **five quest rarities**. The rarer the quest, the harder the challenge—but also **the better the rewards!**  

![Quest Books](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c3a596207908b7e0e57f69efe0f1d3d4a3c7135.png)
## Quest Slots  
You have a **limited number of quest slots**, meaning you can only work on a set number of quests at the same time. You can **upgrade your slots** using points, allowing you to take on more challenges at once!

![menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/878563eb02126872d911bbc555ffad478ae64e52.png)
## Questbooks & Progression  
Each quest is stored in a **Questbook**. Keeping it in your inventory activates the quest, allowing you to track progress. Progress is **saved within the book**, meaning you can share it and store it without losing any data.  

![Progress](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b43796a45624a750efa3e99bd54e2ff2b0a92def.png)
## Claiming Rewards  
Once a quest is completed, you can **claim your rewards** to earn **XP and points**. These points help you **level up and unlock even more powerful rewards!**

![lvl up](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3670300ab04fd10f1f01164f947c2c0729e05ce4.png)
**There's even more to explore in-game. Jump in and start your adventure!**

## Uninstalling
1. Access the Chat Window.
2. Enter the Uninstall Command and press Enter: 
`
/function quests_journey:uninstall
`
